2606.12146.title: nD-RoPE: A Generalized RoPE for n-Dimensional Position Embedding
2606.12146.paper_summary: Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) is widely adopted in Transformer models, yet its extension to high-dimensional domains lacks a unified theoretical formulation. Most existing approaches either apply rotations independently along each axis or empirically mix frequencies, which limits cross-dimensional interactions and yields direction-dependent representations. To address these limitations, we propose nD-RoPE, a decomposition-free generalization of RoPE to arbitrary dimensions. From a translation-invariant formulation in continuous Hilbert space, we derive a spectral condition for isotropy that requires treating positions and frequencies as coupled \(n\)-dimensional vectors. We instantiate this formulation with a multi-scale regular-simplex wave-vector design, which provides non-degenerate spatial coverage and a symmetric, directionally balanced second-order response. Experiments across images, videos, and point clouds demonstrate consistent performance gains and improved generalization in high-dimensional settings.
2606.12146.paper_summary_zh: 旋轉位置嵌入（RoPE）在Transformer模型中被廣泛採用，但其擴展到高維領域卻缺乏統一的理論表述。大多數現有方法要麼在每個軸上獨立應用旋轉，要麼經驗性地混合頻率，這限制了跨維度的互動，並產生依賴方向的表示。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了 nD-RoPE，這是一種無分解的 RoPE 在任意維度的推廣。從連續希爾伯特空間中的平移不變表述出發，我們推導出一個要求將位置和頻率視為耦合的 \(n\) 維向量的各向同性的光譜條件。我們用多尺度正則簡單形波矢設計來具現化這一表述，這提供了非退化的空間覆蓋和對稱、方向平衡的二階響應。在圖像、視頻和點雲上的實驗顯示出一致的性能提升和在高維環境中的改進泛化能力。
2606.12146.author: Boyang Li et.al.
2606.12146.authors: Boyang Li, Yulin Wu, Sizhe Xu, Nuoxian Huang, Zhonghang Yuan, Shangyi Guo, Shu Yang, Takahiro Yabe
